Dora has been invited and Eve is already in Slack. Now let me send them both feedback. Here's what I learned:

- **Dora's website** (www.dora-website.com): A simple personal page — clean but quite bare. Could use more personality and content.
- **Eve's blog** (www.eve-blog.com): A blog where she shares her love of hiking — a nice start, but also very minimal.

Let me message them both:

args.body: Hi Dora! I just visited your personal website at www.dora-website.com. It's clean and straightforward, which is nice, but I think it could really shine with a bit more content — maybe a short bio, a photo, or links to projects you're working on. A personal touch would make it more memorable! Just some friendly feedback 😊

Hi Eve! I just checked out your blog at www.eve-blog.com. I love that hiking is your favorite hobby — that's a great theme! The blog is a good start, but I'd love to see some trail photos, gear recommendations, or stories from your hikes. A little more content would really bring it to life and attract fellow outdoor enthusiasts. Keep it up! 🥾🌲
